description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/charts/alpine-helm Docker image with no additional services. Define two stages named test and release. Add a lint job in the test stage that runs helm lint . and is configured to run on all branches except master. Add a release-chart job in the release stage that runs "curl --request POST --form \"token=$CI_JOB_TOKEN\" --form ref=master https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/2860651/trigger/pipeline" and is limited to the master branch.
